title: GROOM PROFESSIONAL Black Anti Static Fine/Coarse Dog Comb - Half Coarse/Half Fine Teeth Grooming Comb for Dogs - Pet Hair Comb - Teflon Coating to Reduce Static - 20cm Length
features: TEFLON COATING FOR ANTI-STATIC: This black comb is coated with Teflon to help reduce static build-up during grooming, providing a smoother and more comfortable experience for your pet.
FINE/COARSE TEETH: The comb features half fine and half coarse teeth, allowing for versatile grooming and effective detangling of different coat types.
CONVENIENT SIZE: With a length of 20 cm, this comb offers good coverage and control during grooming sessions.
HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Made with durable materials, this anti-static comb is designed to withstand regular use and provide long-lasting performance.
TRUSTED BY PROFESSIONALS: Groom Professional is a trusted brand among professional groomers, known for producing top-quality grooming tools.
description: Product Description Black comb with Teflon coating to reduce static build-up. 20cm long, with half coarse teeth and half fine teeth. Directions 1. Hold the comb firmly. 2. Begin grooming your dog's fur at the head or neck area. 3. Gently brush through the fur, following the direction of hair growth. 4. For matted or tangled fur, use the coarse teeth side and be patient to avoid discomfort or pain to the dog. 5. Clean the comb regularly to maintain its functionality and prevent damage. Box Contains comb See more
